answer:
The merged process \(N(t)\) is Poisson with rate \(\lambda_1 + \lambda_2 = 3\).  
Given \(N(1)=2\), the conditional distribution of \(N_1(1)\) is binomial with parameters \(n=2\) and \(p = \frac{\lambda_1}{\lambda_1+\lambda_2} = \frac{1}{3}\).  
Thus, \(P(N_1(1)=1 \mid N(1)=2) = \binom{2}{1} \left(\frac{1}{3}\right)^1 \left(\frac{2}{3}\right)^1 = \frac{4}{9} \approx 0.4444\).

\boxed{D}
